questionHtml:
What is the pH of a solution in which the hydroxide ion concentration is 1 × 10−11 mol dm−3 at 298 K?

Kw = 1 × 10−14 at 298 K

A.     3

B.     7

C.     11

D.     14

meta.title: What is the pH of a solution in which the hydroxide ion concentration is 1 × 10−11 mol dm−3 at 298 K? Kw = 1 × 10−14 at 298 K A. 3 B. 7 C. 11 D. 14
